settings.name: chapsmart_api_key
settings.title: ChapSmart API Key
settings.description: Your ChapSmart API key (starts with chp_). Contact ChapSmart to get one.

settings.name: chapsmart_api_secret
settings.title: ChapSmart API Secret
settings.description: Your ChapSmart API secret. Keep this safe.

settings.name: chapsmart_account_number
settings.title: Account Number
settings.description: Your ChapSmart account number (locked to your API key).

settings.name: chapsmart_api_url
settings.title: API URL
settings.description: ChapSmart backend URL. Only change for testing.
